concerns.analysis: The HTML output exhibits a significant visual flow issue. In the source PDF, the photograph of a woman with a headache is visually and contextually tied to the heading 'What are the signs of high blood pressure?'. However, in the converted HTML, this image has been moved up into the 'What Is Blood Pressure?' section, appearing before the correct heading. concerns.source_pdf_quote: On page 1 of the PDF, the image of a woman with her hands to her head is positioned directly next to/under the heading 'What are the signs of high blood pressure?'.
concerns.output_quote: In the HTML screenshot, the same image of the woman appears under the 'What Is Blood Pressure?' section, separated from the relevant 'signs' heading by a green block and the heading itself.
concerns.location: Sections 'What Is Blood Pressure?' and 'What are the signs of high blood pressure?'

concerns.analysis: A significant number of meaningful images are missing or failed to render in the HTML output. These include the three circular diagrams on page 1 explaining anatomy, the digital blood pressure monitor diagram on page 2 (which is critical for understanding systolic vs diastolic numbers), all nine illustrative photos for health tips on page 3, and the family photos and organization logo on page 4. Many of these are replaced by large green placeholder blocks or are simply absent.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Meaningful images on Page 1 (3 circles: Heart, Arteries, Blood flow), Page 2 (Digital monitor diagram), Page 3 (9 tip photos), and Page 4 (family photos and 'Start With Your Heart' logo).
concerns.output_quote: The images are missing. The circular diagrams and digital monitor are replaced by green rectangular blocks; the 9 health tip images and page 4 photos are absent entirely.
concerns.location: Throughout the document; specifically under 'What Is Blood Pressure?', 'How Is Blood Pressure Checked?', 'Take Control for Good Health', and 'Goals and Information'.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: There are several minor text omissions throughout the document. The text labels for diagrams on Page 1 ('Heart', 'Arteries in the heart', 'Blood flowing through arteries') and Page 2 ('Systolic (top number)', 'Diastolic (bottom number)') are missing as independent text elements. On Page 4, the branding text 'Start With Your Heart' and organization name 'Justus-Warren Heart Disease & Stroke Prevention Task Force' are omitted.
